notes: Fixed solution_uniqueness_guard by making test_interactive_watch_mode and test_watch_runner_signature_updated check for behavior/patterns rather than specific identifier names (inputMode, inputBuffer, debugMode, initialPattern). Fixed tests_verify_behavior_not_text by making test_debug_cli_option execute the CLI via node runner.js --help and verify -d/--debug appears in output, rather than just grep-regexing the source.
